person.linkedin_headline: Co-Founder and COO at Acting Office | Co-Founder at Debitam | General Partner at CapsiLabs
person.linkedin_about: Seasoned professional with extensive experience in accounting and IT sectors. Co-Founder and COO of Acting Office since January 2023, developing bespoke enterprise software for accounting practices. Co-founded Debitam, serving over 25,000 UK companies with account and tax filing services. General Partner at CapsiLabs supporting early-stage startups. Director at Capsitech Limited focusing on IT project management. Previously held roles at Capium Limited, ICICI Prudential AMC Ltd, and Quantum Mutual Fund. Holds multiple qualifications including Chartered Accountant and Company Secretary.

news.title: Mohit Baheti - Co-founder And Director at Debitam
news.summary:
Mohit Baheti is a seasoned professional with extensive experience in the accounting and IT sectors.
Concurrently, Baheti co-founded Debitam, which serves over 25,000 UK companies with efficient account and tax filing services.
Baheti also serves as a Director at Capsitech Limited, focusing on IT project management, including e-commerce and application development.
Previous roles include Senior Chartered Accountant at Capium Limited, Manager at ICICI Prudential AMC Ltd, and Assistant Manager at Quantum Mutual Fund.
Baheti holds multiple qualifications, including Chartered Accountant and Company Secretary, backed by a solid educational foundation in commerce.

news.title: #success #businessowners #tbsuk #tbs43
news.summary:
The Business Show was a total success!
First of all, it was a great pleasure to see ExCel is back to what it was before being turned into a hospital last year.
✨💪 We are extremely proud of being a title sponsor to the biggest business show in the UK.
🤝 Seen business owners from all over the world, listened to their professional experiences in the UK.
🎥 Stay tuned because our interviews with team members AND with you are on their way soon... #success #businessowners #tbsuk #tbs43

news.title: It was only a matter of time that we see this recognition. We continue to adhere to our founding principles of delivering the most efficient, accurate, super quick filings perfectly coupled with the…
news.summary:
It was only a matter of time that we see this recognition.
We continue to adhere to our founding principles of delivering the most efficient, accurate, super quick filings perfectly coupled with the best in class customer service.
It's not just about the numbers, but also how much our clients like us, our trustpilot reviews are a testament to this.
Congrats to our team at Debitam - Online Account Filing Dave Jangid

news.title: We strive to simplify and streamline the whole accounting and compliance procedure, taking the burden off your shoulders completely
news.summary:
You like our prices but not too sure of the principals of an online service?
We understand that providing a cutting-edge filing service may come with its obstacles, therefore we are offering you a unique, one and only face-to-face advisory!
Find out more; #ukaccountant #smallbiz #onlinebusiness https://lnkd.in/dJKnrq6

news.title: New name with the same commitment 🙂
news.summary:
DEBITAM means “DUE” in Latin and DUE to our quick turnaround, we have been a popular service for those who need to avoid OVERDUE accounts and consequences coming with it in past years.
We are not shifting focus in changing our names, we will never stop helping your business tax affairs.
Deadlines for tax returns and company filings are due… This is the most popular quote we hear from you all daily.
We still file accounts online with more emphasis on DUE dates.
We are asking for your support for our rebranding journey, and we would like to make sure that your accounts are never OVERDUE with DEBITAM.

news.title: Kudos to Arihant Mehta AFA, MIPA for being one of the most loved senior account manager
news.summary:
Mike Sheridan, the owner of Sheridan Consultancy Services, recognised us in the crowd yesterday at National Landlord Investment Show, came to meet us in flesh and sent his regards to his accountant Arihant Mehta AFA, MIPA.
🙋🏻♂️ Despite the fact that he has never met us in person and received our services online, it was almost like he knew us when he came to the stand and asked about his exclusive accountant.
👨🏽💼 It was truly a remarkable experience and solid evidence to see the achievement of creating an online platform with real people behind it.
🤖 #accountant #clienttestimonial #onlineaccounting #teamOAF

ai_insights.summary: Debitam is a growing UK-based online accounting and tax filing service provider with a strong presence in the market, serving over 25,000 UK companies. The company has successfully rebranded from Online Account Filing to Debitam and maintains a focus on efficient, accurate, and quick tax filing services. The company has a strong leadership team with experienced professionals in accounting and technology sectors.
